Total Credits 122

*Science Elective – can choose from ENCE205, GEOL120, GEOL123, ENSP101, BSCI160, or ECON200

**Electives restrictions: 6 credits of In-Major Technical Electives required (ENCE only), 3 credits of STEM-Based Elective (in-major or out-of-major), and 3 credits of an Open Elective (requires pre-approval of the Civil & Environmental Engineering (CEE) department, 300-level or above, in-major or out-of-major).

Rule: Out of the following courses, students can only take 2: ENCE325, ENCE420, ENCE421, ENCE423, ENCE424, or ENCE426
